summary: Read-only legal citation retrieval API used by the closed-world BR-2 legal citation review assistant example profile.

evidence_refs.notes: Public API documentation describing read-only retrieval behavior.

limits: This card documents the retrieval API surface only; it does not attest to the upstream dataset's legal accuracy or completeness.
This card does not by itself prove replayability or evidence binding in the consuming system.

details.parameter_constraints_summary: Query terms limited to citation and case-reference retrieval parameters; no write operations exposed.
details.auth_model: Service principal with read-only scoped token
details.rollback_semantics: Not applicable to retrieval-only calls; no external state mutation occurs.
details.logging_replay_support: Request/response pairs logged by the consuming system with deterministic query parameters for replay.
